credentials.failedToFetchHostsUsing: Failed to fetch hosts using this credential

credentials.organizationDescription: Organize your credentials with folders and tags

credentials.leaveEmptyToKeepCurrent: Leave empty to keep current value
credentials.generateKeyPairDescription: Generate a new SSH key pair. If you want to protect the key with a passphrase, enter it in the Key Password field below first.
credentials.deploySSHKeyDescription: Deploy public key to target server
credentials.deploymentProcessDescription: This will safely add the public key to the target host's ~/.ssh/authorized_keys file without overwriting existing keys. The operation is reversible.
credentials.chooseHostToDeploy: Choose a host to deploy to...
credentials.copyDeployCommandDescription: Copy a shell command to manually add the public key to a host's authorized_keys file. Useful when password authentication is disabled.
credentials.manualDeployInfo: Paste this command in the target host's terminal (e.g., Proxmox console, IPMI, or physical access) to add the SSH key.
credentials.name: Name
credentials.sshKeyGenerationNotImplemented: SSH key generation feature coming soon
credentials.credentialSecuredDescription: All sensitive data is encrypted with AES-256
credentials.securityReminderText: Never share your credentials. All data is encrypted at rest.
credentials.noHostsUsingCredential: No hosts are currently using this credential
credentials.createCredentialDescription: Create a new SSH credential for secure access

credentials.failedToRemoveFromFolder: Failed to remove credential from folder
credentials.failedToMoveToFolder: Failed to move credential to folder
credentials.publicKeyNote: Public key is optional but recommended for key validation
credentials.privateKeyRequiredForGeneration: Private key is required to generate public key
credentials.generateKeyPairNote: Generate a new SSH key pair directly. This will replace any existing keys in the form.
credentials.keyBasedOnlyForDeployment: Only SSH key-based credentials can be deployed
credentials.publicKeyRequiredForDeployment: Public key is required for deployment

homepage.loggedInMessage: You are logged in! Use the sidebar to access all available tools. To get started, create an SSH Host in the SSH Manager tab. Once created, you can connect to that host using the other apps in the sidebar.

serverConfig.mustIncludeProtocol: Server URL must start with http:// or https://

hosts.title: Host Manager
hosts.noHostsMessage: You haven't added any SSH hosts yet. Click "Add Host" to get started.

hosts.exportAllSensitiveWarning: The exported file will contain sensitive authentication data (passwords/SSH keys) in plaintext. Please keep the file secure and delete it after use.
hosts.importJsonDesc: Upload a JSON file to bulk import multiple SSH hosts (max 100).
hosts.exportCredentialWarning: Warning: Host "{{name}}" uses credential authentication. The exported file will not include the credential data and will need to be manually reconfigured after import. Do you want to continue?

hosts.failedToExportHost: Failed to export host. Please ensure you're logged in and have access to the host data.
hosts.jsonMustContainHosts: JSON must contain a "hosts" array or be an array of hosts
hosts.noHostsInJson: No hosts found in JSON file

hosts.passwordRequired: Password is required when using password authentication
hosts.sshKeyRequired: SSH Private Key is required when using key authentication
hosts.keyTypeRequired: Key Type is required when using key authentication
hosts.mustSelectValidSshConfig: Must select a valid SSH configuration from the list
hosts.failedToSaveHost: Failed to save host. Please try again.
hosts.enableTerminalDesc: Enable/disable host visibility in Terminal tab

hosts.enableFileManagerDesc: Enable/disable host visibility in File Manager tab

hosts.defaultPathDesc: Default directory when opening file manager for this host
hosts.sshpassRequiredDesc: For password authentication in tunnels, sshpass must be installed on the system.
hosts.debianUbuntuEquivalent: (Debian/Ubuntu) or the equivalent for your OS.
hosts.sshServerConfigDesc: For tunnel connections, the SSH server must be configured to allow port forwarding:
hosts.gatewayPortsYes: to bind remote ports to all interfaces
hosts.permitRootLoginYes: if using root user for tunneling
hosts.opksshAuthDescription: Prompts you for OPKSSH web-auth upon every connect. Your auth token will last for 24 hours until it must be renewed.
hosts.credentialRequired: Credential is required when using credential authentication
hosts.credentialDescription: Selecting a credential will overwrite the current username and use the credential's authentication details.
hosts.cannotChangeAuthAsSharedUser: Cannot change authentication as shared user
hosts.enableServerStatsDesc: Enable/disable server statistics collection for this host
hosts.displayItemsDesc: Choose which metrics to display on the server stats page
hosts.customCommandsDesc: Define custom shutdown and reboot commands for this server
hosts.confirmRemoveFromFolder: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from folder "{{folder}}"? The host will be moved to "No Folder".
hosts.failedToRemoveFromFolder: Failed to remove host from folder
hosts.editFolderAppearanceDesc: Customize the color and icon for folder
hosts.confirmDeleteAllHostsInFolder: Are you sure you want to delete all {{count}} hosts in folder "{{folder}}"? This action cannot be undone.
hosts.failedToDeleteHostsInFolder: Failed to delete hosts in folder
hosts.failedToMoveToFolder: Failed to move host to folder
hosts.enabledWidgetsDesc: Select which statistics widgets to display for this host
hosts.monitoringConfigurationDesc: Configure how often server statistics and status are checked
hosts.statusCheckEnabledDesc: Check if the server is online or offline
hosts.statusCheckIntervalDesc: How often to check if host is online (5s - 1h)
hosts.disableTcpPingDescription: Turn off status checks (online/offline detection) for this host
hosts.metricsEnabledDesc: Collect CPU, RAM, disk, and other system statistics
hosts.metricsIntervalDesc: How often to collect server statistics (5s - 1h)
hosts.metricsNotAvailableForConnectionType: Server metrics are only available for SSH hosts. TCP ping status checks can still be enabled above.
hosts.intervalValidation: Monitoring intervals must be between 5 seconds and 1 hour (3600 seconds)
hosts.monitoringDisabled: Server monitoring is disabled for this host
hosts.enableMonitoring: Enable monitoring in Host Manager → Statistics tab
hosts.chooseColorTheme: Choose a color theme for the terminal
hosts.selectFontDesc: Select the font to use in the terminal
hosts.scrollbackBufferDesc: Number of lines to keep in scrollback history
hosts.bellStyleDesc: How to handle terminal bell (BEL character, \x07). Programs trigger this when completing tasks, encountering errors, or for notifications. "Sound" plays an audio beep, "Visual" flashes the screen briefly, "Both" does both, "None" disables bell alerts.
hosts.rightClickSelectsWordDesc: Right-clicking selects the word under cursor
hosts.fastScrollSensitivityDesc: Scroll speed multiplier when modifier is held
hosts.minimumContrastRatioDesc: Automatically adjust colors for better readability
hosts.sshAgentForwardingDesc: Forward SSH authentication agent to remote host
hosts.noneAuthDescription: This authentication method will use keyboard-interactive authentication when connecting to the SSH server.
hosts.noneAuthDetails: Keyboard-interactive authentication allows the server to prompt you for credentials during connection. This is useful for servers that require multi-factor authentication or if you do not want to save credentials locally.
hosts.forceKeyboardInteractiveDesc: Forces the use of keyboard-interactive authentication. This is sometimes required for servers that use Two-Factor Authentication (TOTP/2FA).
hosts.overrideCredentialUsernameDesc: Use a different username than the one stored in the credential. This allows you to use the same credential with different usernames.
hosts.jumpHostsDescription: Jump hosts (also known as bastion hosts) allow you to connect to a target server through one or more intermediate servers. This is useful for accessing servers behind firewalls or in private networks.
hosts.jumpHostsOrder: Connections will be made in order: Jump Host 1 → Jump Host 2 → ... → Target Server
hosts.portKnockingDesc: Send a sequence of connection attempts to specified ports before connecting. Used to open firewall rules dynamically.
hosts.socks5Description: Configure SOCKS5 proxy for SSH connection. All traffic will be routed through the specified proxy server.
hosts.enableSocks5Description: Use SOCKS5 proxy for this SSH connection
hosts.socks5UsernameOptional: Optional: leave empty if proxy doesn't require authentication
hosts.socks5PasswordOptional: Optional: leave empty if proxy doesn't require authentication
hosts.socks5ProxyChainDescription: Configure a chain of SOCKS proxies. Each proxy in the chain will connect through the previous one.
hosts.socks5SavePresetDescription: Save the current proxy chain configuration as a reusable preset
hosts.socks5EmptyChainError: Cannot save an empty proxy chain
hosts.socks5ProxyChainEmpty: Add at least one proxy to the chain
hosts.socks5HostDescription: Hostname or IP address of the SOCKS proxy server
hosts.socks5PortDescription: Port number of the SOCKS proxy server (default: 1080)
hosts.noProxyNodes: No proxy nodes configured. Click 'Add Proxy Node' to add one.
hosts.quickActionsDescription: Quick actions allow you to create custom buttons that execute SSH snippets on this server. These buttons will appear at the top of the Server Stats page for quick access.
hosts.quickActionsOrder: Quick action buttons will appear in the order listed above on the Server Stats page
hosts.sidebarCustomizationDesc: Choose which actions appear as quick buttons in the sidebar. Actions not shown as buttons will appear in the dropdown menu.
hosts.showTerminalInSidebarDesc: Display terminal as a quick button in the sidebar
hosts.showFileManagerInSidebarDesc: Display file manager as a quick button in the sidebar
hosts.showTunnelInSidebarDesc: Display tunnel management as a quick button in the sidebar
hosts.showDockerInSidebarDesc: Display docker management as a quick button in the sidebar
hosts.showServerStatsInSidebarDesc: Display server statistics as a quick button in the sidebar
hosts.atLeastOneActionRequired: At least one enabled action must be shown in the sidebar
hosts.sudoPasswordAutoFillDesc: Automatically offer to insert SSH password when sudo prompts for password
hosts.sudoPasswordDesc: Optional password for sudo commands (useful with key authentication)
hosts.keepaliveSettingsDesc: Configure SSH-level keepalive behavior. Set interval to 0 to disable SSH keepalives (useful for MikroTik and other devices that ignore keepalive requests).
hosts.keepaliveIntervalDesc: How often to send SSH keepalive pings. Default: 30000 (30s). Set to 0 to disable.
hosts.keepaliveCountMaxDesc: Disconnect after this many unanswered keepalives. Default: 3.
hosts.executeSnippetOnConnect: Execute a snippet when the terminal connects
hosts.autoMoshDesc: Automatically run MOSH command on connect
hosts.autoTmuxDesc: Automatically attach to an existing (or start a new) tmux session for persistent sessions and cross-device continuity
hosts.environmentVariablesDesc: Set custom environment variables for the terminal session
hosts.failedToCopyUrl: Failed to copy URL to clipboard
hosts.fullScreenUrlTooltip: Copy URL to open this app in full-screen mode
hosts.notEnabled: Docker is not enabled for this host. Enable it in Host Settings to use Docker features.

auth.dataLossWarning: Resetting your password this way will delete all your saved SSH hosts, credentials, and other encrypted data. This action cannot be undone. Only use this if you have forgotten your password and are not logged in.
auth.authenticationDisabledDesc: All authentication methods are currently disabled. Please contact your administrator.
auth.passwordResetSuccessDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

hostKey.firstConnectionTitle: First time connecting to this host
hostKey.firstConnectionDescription: The authenticity of this host cannot be established. Verify the fingerprint matches what you expect.
hostKey.keyChangedDescription: The host key for this server has changed since your last connection. This could indicate a security issue.
hostKey.verifyInstructions: If you trust this host, click Accept to continue and save this fingerprint for future connections.

errors.databaseConnection: Could not connect to the database
errors.failedUserInfo: Failed to get user info after login
errors.invalidAuthUrl: Invalid authorization URL received from backend
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired - please log in again
errors.totpRateLimited: Rate limited: Too many TOTP verification attempts. Please try again later.
errors.totpRateLimitedWithTime: Rate limited: Too many TOTP verification attempts. Please wait {{time}} seconds before trying again.
errors.resetCodeRateLimited: Rate limited: Too many verification attempts. Please try again later.
errors.resetCodeRateLimitedWithTime: Rate limited: Too many verification attempts. Please wait {{time}} seconds before trying again.

messages.registrationDisabled: New account registration is currently disabled by an admin. Please log in or contact an administrator.
messages.userNotAllowed: Your account is not authorized to register. Please contact an administrator.
messages.databaseConnectionFailed: Failed to connect to the database server
messages.checkServerConnection: Please check your server connection and try again
messages.resetCodeSent: Reset code sent to Docker logs

profile.title: User Profile
profile.description: Manage your account settings and security
profile.selectPreferredLanguage: Select your preferred language for the interface
profile.fileColorCodingDesc: Color-code files by type: folders (red), files (blue), symlinks (green)
profile.commandAutocompleteDesc: Enable Tab key autocomplete suggestions for terminal commands based on your command history
profile.commandHistoryTrackingDesc: Store terminal commands in history for autocomplete and sidebar. Disabled by default for privacy.
profile.defaultSnippetFoldersCollapsedDesc: When enabled, all snippet folders will be collapsed when you open the snippets tab
profile.showHostTagsDesc: Display tags under each host in the sidebar. Disable to hide all tags.
profile.c2sTunnelConfigDesc: Local desktop tunnels targeting configured SSH hosts.
profile.c2sTunnelPresetsDesc: Save this desktop client's local tunnel list as a named server preset, or load a preset back into this client.
profile.c2sTunnelPresetsUnavailable: Client tunnel presets are only available in the desktop client.
profile.c2sCurrentLocalConfig: {{count}} local client tunnel(s) configured on this desktop.
profile.c2sPresetSyncNote: Presets are explicit snapshots; loading one replaces this desktop client's local client tunnel list.
profile.c2sPresetLoadError: Failed to load client tunnel presets
profile.confirmSnippetExecutionDesc: Show confirmation dialog before executing snippets
profile.disableUpdateCheckDesc: Stop checking for new versions on startup and dashboard. Reduces network requests.
profile.passwordChangedSuccess: Password changed successfully! Please log in again.
profile.failedToChangePassword: Failed to change password. Please check your current password and try again.
profile.appearanceDesc: Select the color theme for the application
profile.fontSizeDesc: Adjust the base font size across the application
profile.terminalSyntaxHighlightingDesc: Automatically highlight commands, paths, IPs, and log levels in terminal output
profile.enableCommandPaletteShortcutDesc: Double-tap left Shift to open the Command Palette for quick access to hosts
profile.enableTerminalSessionPersistenceDesc: Maintain SSH connections when switching tabs or closing the browser (may be unstable)

placeholders.searchCredentials: Search credentials by name, username, or tags...
placeholders.searchHosts: Search hosts by name, username, IP, folder, tags...
placeholders.socks5PresetDescription: e.g., Proxy chain for accessing work servers

dashboardTab.editModeInstructions: Drag cards to reorder · Drag the column divider to resize columns · Drag the bottom edge of a card to resize its height · Trash to remove
